race.comment: Tricky and the betting will be instructive. DOUBLE COOL (1) resumes and is promising. Comes off a 1.8L defeat in the Magic Millions 2yo Classic at Gold Coast. Looks up to the mark following a trial win at Deagon and missed a whisker here the only fresh outing. PRIVATE MAX (5) debuts for the sharp Matt Dunn yard with two trials under the saddle. Jumps from an inside gate with a 2kg claim and a bold run is on the cards. POWERFILLY (9) spiked her figures leading at Doomben narrowly beaten at big odds. Has to skip over from a wide gate today but the blinkers go on and she's likely to give a big sight. VINCLEY (6) led and just missed a place at the Gold Coast on debut and is sure to build on that. KAVA EXPRESS (10) is a Vandyke-trained debutant who draws low and is likely to be better than the trial finishes suggest.
